name: New Generation Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the potatoes into one-half-inch pieces.
2. Cook the potatoes in boiling water, covered, for 15-20 minutes or until tender. Drain well.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cooked potatoes, sliced green onions, and 1/2 teaspoon garlic salt and pepper. Gently toss to mix.
4. In another small bowl, stir together the yogurt, buttermilk, blue cheese, and remaining 1/4 teaspoon garlic salt until smooth.
5. Add the yogurt mixture to the potatoes; gently toss to coat evenly.
6. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
7. Serves 10.
Nutritional analysis per serving: Calories 166; protein 7 grams; fat 4 grams; carbohydrate 27 grams; calcium 21 milligrams.
